creator: ganbold-freebsd@ateamsystems.com
text:
(In reply to Bernard Spil from comment #18)

The problem is still the same with:

galera-25.3.16                 Synchronous multi-master replication engine

and Makefile patched:

mariadb101-client-10.1.16_1    Multithreaded SQL database (client)
mariadb101-server-10.1.16_1    Multithreaded SQL database (server)
